impact: This gives the PP&D daemon deterministic recovery rules for the blocked checkbox-121 pattern: syntax-first import tests must fail malformed Python when the module exists, but must not fail the whole suite solely because a future module is absent. The worker can resume by using skip-aware tests or by selecting a prerequisite fixture/implementation task instead of repeatedly proposing failing tests.
summary: Add a supervisor repair guide for syntax-first test tasks whose target module does not yet exist.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-121: Add a one-file syntax-first import test for `ppd.extraction.online_trade_permit_requirements` that imports only that module and fails malformed Python before broad online trade permit requirement validation runs.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
